notes: Scenario modal Save/Cancel buttons were hidden behind bottom nav + FAB. Diagnostic confirmed: modal foot at y=477-551 overlapped bottom nav at y=479-551, AND elementsFromPoint returned <nav#bottomNav> and <button#fabBtn> as top elements at screen bottom (z-index ordering wasn't enough). Fix: when ANY .tx-modal-overlay has .show class, body gets .modal-open class which hides #bottomNav and #fabBtn via display: none !important. Cleanest possible fix — no more overlap regardless of z-index. Wired into openScModal/closeScModal AND tx modal show/hide. Also added .tx-modal stacking context (position: relative; z-index: 1) for belt-and-suspenders.
